title: Inside And Outside.
content:
God alone sees the heart and therefore, since he alone sees it,
    Be it our care that we, too, something that's worthy may see.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "Inside And Outside.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
